description: Copilot YOLO-kö v3 — Fas 24.B zon-polish + design-system UI + super-yolo.

tasks.title: Vänliga empty-states i listvyer

tasks.title: Expandera typecheck:core-strict över features/

tasks.title: Zon-polish Vardagen (Fas 24.B)
tasks.plan: Fas 24.B — polish /vardagen (MåBra, Planering, Ekonomi). Minimal diff, tokens enligt design-calm.

tasks.title: Deploy-prep hosting+functions (ej deploy)

tasks.title: G85 prod-sync + enhetsinstruktion
